weeklyCadence.label: Weekly Pack Refresh
weeklyCadence.rule: Every pack must be rebuilt weekly from latest-public-drops, live-intel, intel-vault, source files, book routes, and filtered forum exports. Active news links must stay source-labelled and expired links must move to the vault.

title: Intelligence Network Pack
label: Agency / surveillance pack
summary: A briefing pack for agency history, surveillance, covert programs, AI-cyber warnings, data exposure, declassified archives, and deep-state terminology.
weeklyMission: Track the intelligence-state lane: official warnings, cyber alerts, AI capability claims, declassified files, surveillance expansion, and private network exposure.
brandLine: The agency file is not one event. It is a structure: power, secrecy, oversight, contractors, and capability.
boundary: A dossier pack is an orientation bundle. It does not prove guilt, causation, intent, control, or criminal conduct.

items.laneTitle: War Machine / Intelligence State / AI Cyber
items.title: Five Eyes warns frontier AI cyber-attack capability could arrive within months
items.summary: Five Eyes cyber authorities reportedly warned that advanced AI models capable of major cyberattacks against governments and businesses may be only months away.
items.evidenceBoundary: A warning is not proof of a specific attack. Track agency statement, model capability claims, export restrictions, mitigations, and future incident evidence separately.
items.whyItMatters: This connects AI, intelligence agencies, cyber resilience, business risk, model controls, and security-state expansion into one high-priority timer lane.
items.nextAction: Move AI Breakout and Cyber Blackout clocks upward only through source-backed warnings, incidents, procurement, restrictions, or confirmed capability disclosures.
items.videoHook: Five Eyes just moved AI from tech hype into national-security cyber countdown. The question is not whether AI is magic. The question is who gets offensive capability first.
items.rumbleLongTitle: Five Eyes Warning: AI Cyberattack Models Could Be Months Away, Turning AI Into A Security Timer
items.sourceRequirement: Official Five Eyes statement, agency advisory, or reputable reporting quoting the warning

items.title: Pentagon looks into Dialog data exposure involving national-security officials
items.summary: Reporting says a data exposure at Dialog exposed personal information for U.S. and allied national-security and military officials, prompting Pentagon review of possible operational risk.
items.evidenceBoundary: A data exposure is not proof of espionage or compromise. Track what was exposed, who had access, official risk assessment, remediation, and any confirmed exploitation.
items.whyItMatters: The security state is increasingly routed through private events, invitation networks, elite forums, vendors, and platforms whose misconfigurations can expose sensitive nodes.
items.nextAction: Add to intelligence/private-network exposure lane and watch for Pentagon statement, remediation notice, affected-role disclosure, and follow-up risk findings.
items.videoHook: The intelligence state does not only leak through spies. Sometimes it leaks through elite private networks and bad web configuration.
items.rumbleShortTitle: Dialog Exposure: Private Network Intel Risk
items.rumbleLongTitle: National Security Data Exposure: Pentagon Looks Into Dialog Leak Risk
items.sourceRequirement: Reporter evidence, company statement, Pentagon response, official review, or breach notice

items.title: Israel cyber chief says Iranian cyber incidents surged in June 2026
items.summary: Israel's cyber chief reportedly said hostile cyber incidents rose sharply in June 2026 amid conflict conditions, while critical infrastructure had not been compromised.
items.evidenceBoundary: Reported incident counts are not proof of attribution for every incident. Track official statements, technical indicators, affected sectors, and independent confirmation.
items.whyItMatters: This is a current cyber-war pressure signal: cyber operations continue even when kinetic ceasefires or diplomatic pauses are discussed.
items.nextAction: Update cyber timer and watch critical infrastructure, banking, telecom, legal/accounting firms, and public-sector incident reporting.
items.videoHook: Ceasefire does not mean cyberfire. The public war clock may pause while the network war accelerates.
items.rumbleLongTitle: Cyber War Update: Israel Says Iranian Cyber Incidents Surged In June 2026
items.sourceRequirement: Official cyber agency statement, incident report, technical advisory, or reputable reporting

takeaways: Declassified records are powerful but limited.
Historical programs do not prove every modern claim.
Oversight failure and conspiracy claims must be separated.
Agency books should be read in series order.
Cyber and AI warnings are timer signals, not proof of a specific attack.
